---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for MarkFlow Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see added.

## Motivation

Please describe the motivation or use case for this feature. Why is it needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or implementation idea. If possible, include any relevant examples or mockups.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Would You Be Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I would like to submit a pull request for this feature
- [ ] No, I am just suggesting the idea
